_comment: Build 284 fixture. Fake/sanitized Vapi End Of Call Report (PSTN) representing the SECOND live booking-observation call (Build 283-approved, consumed once, no retry). It reproduces the exact live gap: the mapped clean Vapi number's EOCR reached the backend and normalized appointment_booked=false / appointment_requested=false / appointment_time=null (booking_id=null) EVEN THOUGH the Build 281 structuredOutputs fix was DEPLOYED — because the live call-completed payload carried NO usable structured appointment fields (no analysis.structuredData, no analysis.structuredOutputs). The booking intent lived ONLY in the trusted Vapi summary + transcript, which clearly state an in-person site visit was scheduled for Thursday, July 2nd, at 2 PM (an EXPLICIT calendar date, not just a weekday). The Build 284 conservative summary/transcript fallback derives appointment_booked=true / appointment_requested=true / appointment_time populated from this text, so with the mapped roofer resolving, lead + call persist AND createVapiBooking now creates the booking (booking_id present) offline. The mapping lives in the roofer row, not this payload; destination +1555-0188 is a reserved fictional number standing in for the mapped clean Vapi number (last-4 0389). Raw live transcript/body is NOT committed; this is a minimal sanitized paraphrase. Reserved fictional 555-01xx numbers only; no real PII, no real clean Vapi number, no real UUID/call-id, no recording URL.

message.transcript: AI: Thanks for calling, roofing services, how can I help? Homeowner: I have an emergency leak over the garage and need someone out fast. AI: I can get an emergency in-person site visit scheduled. Does Thursday, July 2nd, at 2 PM work? Homeowner: Yes, Thursday, July 2nd at 2 PM is perfect, please book it. AI: You're all set — your in-person site visit is booked for Thursday, July 2nd, at 2 PM.
message.summary: Homeowner reported an emergency garage roof leak. An emergency in-person site visit was scheduled for Thursday, July 2nd, at 2 PM.

analysis.successEvaluation: Homeowner engaged and an in-person site visit was scheduled during the call.
